channel.title: GitHub SCSS Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of SCSS in GitHub

item.title: jekyll/minima
item.description: Minima is a one-size-fits-all Jekyll theme for writers.

item.title: just-the-docs/just-the-docs
item.description: A modern, high customizable, responsive Jekyll theme for documentation with built-in search.

item.title: black7375/Firefox-UI-Fix
item.description: 🦊 I respect proton UI and aim to improve it.

item.title: keyvanakbary/learning-notes
item.description: Notes on books I read, talks I watch, articles I study, and papers I love

item.title: pages-themes/cayman
item.description: Cayman is a Jekyll theme for GitHub Pages

item.title: Hacker0x01/hacker101
item.description: Source code for Hacker101.com - a free online web and mobile security class.

item.title: andrewbanchich/forty-jekyll-theme
item.description: A Jekyll version of the "Forty" theme by HTML5 UP.

item.title: uswds/uswds
item.description: The U.S. Web Design System helps the federal government build fast, accessible, mobile-friendly websites.

item.title: creativetimofficial/soft-ui-dashboard
item.description: Soft UI Dashboard - Free and OpenSource Bootstrap 5 Dashboard

item.title: prakhar1989/docker-curriculum
item.description: 🐬 A comprehensive tutorial on getting started with Docker!

item.title: sivan/heti
item.description: 赫蹏（hètí）是专为中文内容展示设计的排版样式增强。它基于通行的中文排版规范而来，可以为网站的读者带来更好的文章阅读体验。

item.title: mldangelo/personal-site
item.description: My personal website - built with React, React-Router, React-Snap for Static-Export, and GitHub Pages.
